reference: Hello there, my name is Avinash, and I was recently discharged from the hospital where I was admitted for the treatment of an infection and cystitis of the urinary bladder. It has been four days since my discharge, and I have been feeling pain in the area around my right kidney since yesterday. Can you suggest what to do in this situation, as I am far from a doctor and cannot go immediately?
text: Hello there, my name is Avinash and I was recently discharged from the hospital where I was admitted for the treatment of an infection and cystitis of the urinary bladder. It has been four days since my discharge and I have been feeling pain in the area around my right kidney since yesterday. Can you suggest what to do in this situation as I am far from a doctor and cannot go immediately?
